name: Seven Flavor Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, cut into thin strips
1/4 pound Fresh snow peas, trimmed and julienned
1/2 cup Chopped green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend 1 tablespoon each of soy sauce and sesame oil with cornstarch; stir in the chicken. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Break vermicelli in half and cook according to package directions, omitting salt. Drain and keep warm in a large mixing bowl.
3. Dissolve sugar in the remaining soy sauce, sesame oil, and vinegar. Set aside.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat. Add chicken and stir fry for 3 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Heat the remaining vegetable oil in the same pan. Add carrot and snow peas; stir fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (ginger root, crushed red pepper) and stir fry for another 1 minute.
7. Return the chicken to the pan and add the sugar mixture. Stir well.
8. Pour over vermicelli and toss together to combine. Serve immediately.
